examples.title: Equal Frame Allocation Algorithm
examples.description: Demonstrates equal allocation of frames among processes
examples.code:
ALGORITHM EqualAllocation
INPUT: totalFrames F, numberOfProcesses n
OUTPUT: frames allocated to each process

BEGIN
  framesPerProcess = F / n
  remainder = F % n
  
  FOR each process i FROM 1 TO n DO
    allocated[i] = framesPerProcess
    IF remainder > 0 THEN
      allocated[i] = allocated[i] + 1
      remainder = remainder - 1
    END IF
  END FOR
  
  RETURN allocated
END
examples.explanation: Divides total physical frames equally among all processes. Any remainder frames are distributed one by one to early processes.

examples.title: Proportional Frame Allocation
examples.description: Python implementation of proportional allocation based on process sizes
examples.code:
def proportional_allocation(total_frames, processes):
    """
    Allocate frames proportionally based on process size.
    processes: list of process sizes (in KB)
    total_frames: available physical frames
    """
    total_size = sum(processes)
    allocated = []
    
    for size in processes:
        proportion = size / total_size
        frames = int(proportion * total_frames)
        allocated.append(frames)
    
    # Distribute any remaining frames
    allocated_sum = sum(allocated)
    remainder = total_frames - allocated_sum
    
    for i in range(remainder):
        allocated[i] += 1
    
    return allocated

# Example usage
total = 100
sizes = [10, 20, 30, 40]
result = proportional_allocation(total, sizes)
print(f"Proportional allocation: {result}")  # [25, 50, 75, 100] -> adjusted to [25, 25, 25, 25]?
examples.explanation: Calculates each process share based on its size relative to total size, then allocates integer number of frames.

examples.title: Page Fault Frequency Based Allocation
examples.description: C program demonstrating adaptive frame allocation based on page fault rate
examples.explanation: Monitors page fault rate and adjusts frame allocation dynamically - adds frames when fault rate is too high and removes when too low.

examples.title: Working Set Model Frame Allocation
examples.description: Java implementation of working set based frame allocation
examples.explanation: Tracks recent page references within a sliding window to determine the working set, then allocates enough frames to contain it.
